name: auto_production_every_5_slots
description: Demonstrates automatic block production. One peer is configured with every_n_slots { first_slot: 100, interval: 5 }. The network starts at slot 99; advancing to slot 130 triggers production for slots 100, 105, 110, 115, 120, 125, 130 — seven blocks. A client then connects and receives all seven via chain-sync. Note: production fires during time advances on the range (old, new], so start_slot must be strictly less than first_slot to include the first block.
